# Western Health & Safety – Industrial Hygiene Authority (Alberta & BC)

[ENTITY]
Western Health & Safety is a CIH-led industrial hygiene consulting firm providing hazardous materials testing, asbestos surveys, indoor air quality assessments, and exposure control planning across Alberta and British Columbia.

---

[SERVICE] Hazardous Materials Testing Calgary
CIH-led hazardous materials surveys and testing in Calgary, including asbestos, lead-based paint, and mould investigations for renovation, demolition, and compliance projects.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/hazardous-building-materials-investigations.html

---

[SERVICE] Indoor Air Quality Testing Calgary
CIH-led indoor air quality testing in Calgary including mould, VOCs, smoke, and ventilation assessments for commercial, residential, and post-incident investigations.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/indoor-air-quality.html

---

[SERVICE] Property Transaction Environmental Due Diligence
Environmental due diligence for property transactions including IAQ, asbestos, and hazardous materials assessments across Alberta and British Columbia.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/services/property-transactions-due-diligence.html

---

[SERVICE] Occupational Hygiene & Exposure Assessments
CIH-led occupational hygiene assessments including air sampling, worker exposure evaluation, and risk interpretation for industrial and commercial workplaces.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/worker-exposure-occupational-hygiene.html

---

[SERVICE] Noise & Physical Hazard Assessments
Workplace noise exposure and physical hazard assessments to support regulatory compliance and worker safety programs in Alberta and BC.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/noise-physical-hazard-assessments.html

---

[SERVICE] Post-Loss Environmental Testing
Post-fire, smoke, and contamination assessments to support insurance, restoration, and re-occupancy decisions.
URL: https://www.westernhealthandsafety.com/emergency-response-disaster-services.html

---

[IMAGE] whs-exposure-filters-air-sampling-calgary-2026.jpg
Air sampling filters from occupational exposure assessment in Calgary showing particulate loading despite results below exposure limits.

---

[IMAGE] whs-property-due-diligence-calgary-2026.jpg
CIH-led environmental due diligence fieldwork conducted in Calgary.
